name: CompanyData.com
description: Search and export company records from official trade registers worldwide, and look up supported city names for location filtering.

auth.hint: Request a CompanyData.com/BoldData API key and send it in the x-api-key header.

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search for companies worldwide by name, location, or classification.

params.name: countryCode
params.description: Comma-separated ISO country codes to restrict results to.

params.name: cityName
params.description: Exact city name; use the search_cities tool to find supported values.

params.name: statusCode
params.description: 0 for single location, 1 for headquarters, 2 for branch; comma-separated.

params.name: page
params.description: One-based page number; standard pagination supports up to 10,000 records total.

tools.name: export_companies
tools.description: Export full company profiles matching search criteria, with fields depending on the account's purchased package.

params.name: export
params.description: Must be true to request full export fields instead of basic search fields.

params.name: countryCode
params.description: Comma-separated ISO country codes to restrict results to.

params.name: page
params.description: One-based page number; standard pagination supports up to 10,000 records total.

tools.name: search_cities
tools.description: Look up supported exact city names for use in company search and export location filters.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum results to return; defaults to 100.
